title: Video Metadata Schema
description: Schema for video.json - Global metadata for video assets in TAO DAFT format metropolis-v3.0

version.description: Schema version - must be '3.0' for this schema

rectified.description: Whether the video has been rectified (lens distortion corrected)

scenario_info.description: Information about the video creation scenario, environment, equipment, and purpose
examples: Smart city intersection - traffic flow analysis

scene_description.description: Spatial characteristics and layout of the scene (environment, lighting, objects, spatial arrangement)
examples: Large warehouse with high ceilings, fluorescent lighting, multiple aisles with shelving units, concrete floor
Four-way intersection in urban setting, traffic lights at all corners, crosswalks, moderate vehicle and pedestrian traffic

event_summary.description: Temporal overview of key actions, occurrences, or changes throughout the video duration
examples: Forklift approaches worker, worker steps aside, forklift passes safely
Vehicles stop at red light, pedestrian crosses, light turns green, traffic resumes

camera_id.description: Reference to camera ID in calibration.json for accessing intrinsic/extrinsic parameters

metadata.description: File metadata for identification and cataloging

description.description: Human-readable description of this annotation file

license.description: License under which this annotation is distributed

tags.description: List of tags for categorization and search

duration.description: Total duration of the video in seconds

examples.scenario_info: Warehouse operations - forklift near-miss scenario from IsaacSim
examples.scene_description: Large warehouse with high ceilings and fluorescent lighting. Multiple rows of industrial shelving with pallets. Concrete floor with yellow safety markings. Forklift operating in center aisle.
examples.event_summary: Forklift approaches intersection, worker walking perpendicular path, worker notices forklift and stops, forklift passes through intersection, worker continues walking.
